# Sam's Hotel

> Sam's Hotel is a comfortable, mid-range hotel in Hyderabad, India, offering Deluxe Rooms, Executive Suites and Family Rooms, along with dining, a spa, free parking and 24/7 front desk service.

Sam's Hotel focuses on clean, comfortable rooms, honest pricing with no hidden charges, and friendly, round-the-clock service for both business and leisure travellers.

## Pages

- [Home](https://samhotelsite.netlify.app/index.html): Overview of the hotel, highlights and featured package.
- [About](https://samhotelsite.netlify.app/about.html): The hotel's story, values and full list of amenities.
- [Rooms](https://samhotelsite.netlify.app/rooms.html): Deluxe Room, Executive Suite and Family Room details and pricing.
- [Packages](https://samhotelsite.netlify.app/packages.html): Stay packages (Weekend Getaway, Business Stay, Family Package) and a cost calculator.
- [Gallery](https://samhotelsite.netlify.app/gallery.html): Photos of rooms, dining and common areas.
- [Booking](https://samhotelsite.netlify.app/booking.html): Online booking enquiry form.
- [Contact](https://samhotelsite.netlify.app/contact.html): Address, phone, email and a contact form.

## Contact

- Address: MG Road, Hyderabad, Telangana, India
- Phone: +91-9876543210
- Email: stay@samshotel.com
